---
title: "Bachelorarbeit-Florian-Mischke"
author: "Florian Mischke"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
results <- read.csv("~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Studium/Bachelorarbeit/Test/processed/Results.csv")

str(results)
summary(results)
```

```{r}
samples_images <- readxl::read_excel("~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Studium/Bachelorarbeit/samples_images.xlsx") 
```

```{r}
my_data <- merge(x = results, y = samples_images, by = "FileName", all = TRUE)
```


```{r}
my_data |> ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    x = Species,
    y = Feret
  )
) + geom_boxplot()
```
